productDisplayName: Nike Men As Ad Breakli Navy Blue Shorts
description: Composition Black shorts made of 100% cotton, with blue stitch detailing on the sides, elastic waist with a drawcord, a discreet pocket at the back and two side pockets Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean Built with the breathability and zero-distraction Fit athletes demand for focus, this nike running shorts comes in a front-to-back color-block design, including hi-vis features for night workouts. This high-performance shorts features a supportive two-in-one cut built with fabric that rapidly moves sweat away from the body.
